title: erica unicolor subsp. mutica
intro: Erica unicolor subsp. mutica, also known as the heather, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region, for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Erica unicolor subsp. mutica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
